channel.title: Frequenz
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Frequenz

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Hui Yang, Mincong Chen DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/freq-2025-frontmatter3-4

item.title: A wideband tunable quadrature coupler with flat coupling

item.description: Article by Hui Yang, Mincong Chen DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/freq-2024-0224

item.title: A compact multiband frequency reconfigurable antenna integrated with sextuple band artificial magnetic conductor for heterogeneous wireless applications

item.title: A wideband reconfigurable filtering phase shifter based on Stub-loaded multimode resonators
